prompt: Create one vertical smartphone-friendly scene illustration for a serial web novel. Do not render any readable text, chapter numbers, talk labels, section labels, captions, subtitles, logos, or UI overlays inside the image. Story context: 第3章　朝を持ち帰る / 第2話　汗が引くまで. Scene focus: 第1節　ベランダの深呼吸 / サトーパート. Summary: マンションへ戻るころには、走り終わりの熱がようやく静かなほうへ向かいはじめていた。部屋へ入ってシューズを脱ぎ、軽く肩を回してからベランダへ出る。四月の風は冷たすぎず、汗の引き際… Key beats: マンションへ戻るころには、走り終わりの熱がようやく静かなほうへ向かいはじめていた。部屋へ入ってシューズを脱ぎ、軽く肩を回してからベランダへ出る。四月の風は冷たすぎず、汗の引き際だけを上手にさらっていく。走ったあとの数分としては、これ以上ないくらいちょうどよかった。 キッチンではコーヒーの湯が沸きはじめ、紙袋からはまだパンの匂いが残っている。こういう時間のために走っているのかもしれない、とサトーは思う。川沿いの桜も、橋の風も、結局はこの静かな満足へつながっている。 そのとき、インターホンが一度だけ短く鳴り、すぐに切れた。続けて共用廊下のほうで、台車の車輪が止まるような音がして、それもすぐ遠ざかる。配達の押し間違いだろう。朝のマンションではよくあることだと、サトーは窓枠へ軽く肘を預けた。 ベランダから見える街は、もう完全に朝の色になっている。これでパンとコーヒーまで付くなら、今日はかなり当たりだ。 Use the supplied character reference images to preserve these canonical looks: sato-jogging: サトー. Keep him as a mature 45-year-old Japanese man with long hair tied in a ponytail, mustache and chin beard, and a lean athletic build. In this novel he must always wear cool-weather jogging clothes, never denim or businesswear. sera-jogging: セラ. Keep her in a maid-inspired running outfit rather than an indoor maid dress, with silver-gray hair, golden eyes, black-and-white technical fabrics, and a clearly visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. Do not turn the outfit into armor or a generic tracksuit. Focus characters: sato-jogging. Keep them clearly readable in the foreground or midground. Continuity notes: This is the Sato-side first section of the apartment-intrusion incident paired with scene-003-002-002-sera. Keep the same apartment home setting, same balcony or open window, and same post-run breakfast continuity in both images. In every scene of this novel, Sato must keep his canonical face, long ponytail, mustache, chin beard, and lean 45-year-old build, while wearing early-April jogging wear suited to a cool Tokyo morning: a light running jacket or windbreaker, technical long-sleeve top, tapered running pants, and running shoes. In every scene of this novel, Sera must keep her canonical face, silver-gray hair, golden eyes, and cat ears while wearing a maid-inspired jogging outfit built from black-and-white performance fabrics, with apron-line design cues, a short pleated running skirt over leggings, a light jacket, running shoes, and a visible cat-ear headband support-security unit. For Sato-part images, Sato must be the dominant subject and Sera, if visible, must stay clearly separated from him by distance, never adjacent, never shoulder-to-shoulder, and never readable as a companion; she may be visible in the distance or on another part of the path, but not as an extremely tiny speck. For Sera-part images, Sera must be the dominant subject, actively stopping a separate attacker who clearly does not resemble Sato. In every Sera-part image, Sato must remain an unaware background figure, non-combatant, not helping, facing away from the action or looking elsewhere, and not looking toward Sera, the attacker, or the incident. Never let any attacker resemble Sato in face, hair, beard, age, clothing, build, or silhouette. All human figures must have normal anatomy with exactly two arms and two hands.  Compose a calm post-run home scene with Sato dominant on a modest apartment balcony or by an open window, cooling down while coffee and breakfast wait inside. If Sera appears, place her clearly apart from Sato on a distant exterior line, rooftop shadow, or corridor edge, never companion-like.
